Creates a workspace proposal domain action application projector.

## Import

```ts
import { workspaceProposalDomainActionApplicationProjector } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item";
```

## Signature

```ts
function workspaceProposalDomainActionApplicationProjector(
	graph: Graph,
	opts: WorkspaceProposalDomainActionApplicationProjectorOptions,
): WorkspaceProposalDomainActionApplicationProjectorBundle
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |
| `opts` | `WorkspaceProposalDomainActionApplicationProjectorOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A node bundle that emits the projected records.

## Example

```ts
import { workspaceProposalDomainActionApplicationProjector } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item/scheduling";
```
